title: Cerebellitis
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Cerebellitis''' was a debilitating condition of the [[Brain/Legends|brain]] that affected many [[Human replica droid]]s that had been reprogrammed from their original creation.

==Appearances==
*[[Shadows of the Empire: Evolution 5|''Shadows of the Empire: Evolution'' 5]]

[[Category:Diseases and maladies|Cerebellitis]]
